explanations.3: This imports a constant (a fixed value) called blogPostContainerID from a utility library, which is probably used to mark the main content area with a special ID.
explanations.4: This is a React hook (a special function) that gives us information about the current blog post, like whether we're viewing the full post page or just a preview.
explanations.7: We're extracting the isBlogPostPage value from the hook we imported — it's a boolean (true/false) that tells us if we're on the actual blog post page.
explanations.11: This conditionally sets the ID only when viewing the full blog post page; when it's a preview, the ID stays undefined so the feed generator only processes the real post content.
